emails.body: Re: FW: Questions Make the move Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject: Re: FW: Questions
emails.body: Re: FW: Questions I mean make the move to the US. Unless you teally believe that you can pull off Richard's project which sounds huge. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject: FW: Questions
emails.body: Hi Louise Have spoken with Brad several times. Moving to the US involves finding John a role in the US which would take some time. I am open to moving to the US. Will continue to keep communications open with Brad. Obviously, if you had a role within your organisation then it would be v.cool. Unfortunately, I need to choose something asap due to the Broadband business contracting(!) and the voluntary redundancy programme. For now looks like taking the Spartacus role is the short term solution. Will be speaking to Richard later today to say yes. Let me know what you think?!? Regards Amita To: Kitchen, Louise
